description: Language-agnostic rules applied to all projects

rules.name: no_hardcoded_secrets
rules.description: Detect hardcoded API keys, tokens, passwords, or secrets in source files
rules.message: Potential hardcoded secret detected. Never commit credentials to version control.
rules.fix_suggestion: Move this value to an environment variable (os.getenv / process.env) or a secret manager.

rules.name: no_todo_fixme_in_push
rules.description: Warn on TODO/FIXME/HACK comments left in code before push
rules.message: Unresolved TODO/FIXME/HACK comment found. Resolve or track in your issue tracker before merging.
rules.fix_suggestion: Create a ticket for this work item and remove or reference it in the comment.

rules.name: no_debug_breakpoints
rules.message: Debug breakpoint found. Remove before pushing.
rules.fix_suggestion: Delete the breakpoint line or move it behind a debug flag.

rules.name: no_hardcoded_urls
rules.description: Flag raw hardcoded HTTP/HTTPS URLs that should live in a constants or config file
rules.message: Hardcoded URL found. Move it to a constants file or environment variable for easier maintenance.
rules.fix_suggestion: Define the URL in constants.ts / config.py and import it here.

rules.name: no_merge_conflict_markers
rules.description: Block pushes that contain unresolved merge conflict markers
rules.message: Unresolved merge conflict marker found. Resolve the conflict before pushing.
rules.fix_suggestion: Open the file, resolve the conflict, and remove the marker lines.

rules.name: no_env_file_committed
rules.message: .env file detected in push. This may expose secrets.
rules.fix_suggestion: Add .env to .gitignore and use .env.example with placeholder values instead.

rules.name: no_sql_injection
rules.description: Detect raw string formatting in SQL queries (SQL injection risk)
rules.message: Potential SQL injection: raw string formatting in SQL query. Use parameterized queries.
rules.fix_suggestion: Use parameterized queries: cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM t WHERE id = %s', (id,))

rules.name: no_open_redirect
rules.description: Redirecting to user-controlled URLs without validation (open redirect vulnerability)
rules.message: Potential open redirect: user-controlled value used in redirect without validation.
rules.fix_suggestion: Validate the redirect URL against an allowlist of trusted domains before redirecting.

rules.name: no_ssrf_patterns
rules.description: Detect user-controlled values passed directly to HTTP request functions (SSRF)
rules.message: Potential SSRF: user-controlled value passed directly to HTTP request.
rules.fix_suggestion: Validate and allowlist the target URL/domain before making the request.

rules.name: no_empty_blocks
rules.description: Empty code blocks (if, for, while with no body) are usually a mistake
rules.message: Empty code block detected. Add the intended logic or remove the block.
rules.fix_suggestion: Add the missing implementation or add a comment explaining why it's intentionally empty.
